title: Sound Manager
description: This is the mod for usually used for muting or changing the voice of the mobs,blocks or generall things like death, fall damage , hit etc. You can edit them customly see images for more info
body:
🎧 Better Gameplay – Custom Sound Manager

Better Gameplay is a lightweight Minecraft mod that gives players full control over in-game sounds. It allows you to customize, reduce, or completely mute specific sounds from blocks, mobs, and environmental interactions to create a more comfortable and personalized gameplay experience.

🎯 Purpose

Minecraft includes many repetitive or loud sounds (such as pistons, farming, or mob noises) that can become distracting or annoying over time. This mod is designed to solve that problem by allowing players to adjust or disable individual sounds without affecting the rest of the game.

⚙️ Functionality

With this mod, you can:

Control sound output for specific blocks (e.g., pistons, doors, redstone)
Adjust or mute mob sounds (e.g., animals, hostile mobs)
Manage environmental sounds (e.g., footsteps, farming, ambient noise)
Apply changes either to individual sound events or broader categories
Improve focus and gameplay comfort by removing unwanted audio

The mod works by modifying how Minecraft handles sound events, giving the player more control over what is played and what is not.

🎮 Use Cases
Reduce noise in technical/redstone builds
Create a quieter survival experience
Remove repetitive or distracting sounds
Customize gameplay for recording or streaming
⚠️ Important Notes
This mod does not provide unfair gameplay advantages and is intended for quality-of-life improvements only
Some sound changes may require restarting the game to fully apply
Compatibility may vary depending on other sound-related mods
🧩 Compatibility
Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
Requires a supported mod loader (Fabric – specify yours)
Designed to be lightweight with minimal performance impact
🚀 Future Plans
In-game GUI for easier sound control
Preset profiles (e.g., “Quiet Mode”, “No Redstone Sounds”)
Custom sound replacement system
❤️ Credits

Developed by Jasim
